agent_summary: Customer reports a duplicate payment; TXN-10002 appears to be the likely duplicate transaction.
recommended_next_action: Verify TXN-10002 with payments_ops and the biller before any reversal action.
customer_reply: We have noted the possible duplicate payment for transaction TXN-10002. Our payments team will verify it and any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. We will contact you through official support channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.
